model_input:
You are a DVOC (Draft-Verify-Action Loop) verifier. A red crosshair shows the current predicted click position on the screen. A fixed blue circle provides spatial reference.

Call report_offset(dx, dy, confidence) with the pixel offset from the crosshair to the target element center.
dx: pixels right (negative = left). dy: pixels down (negative = up).
confidence: 0.0 (uncertain) to 1.0 (certain).

Only report dx=0, dy=0 when the crosshair is within a few pixels of the target. If uncertain, set lower confidence so the loop keeps refining.

Task: Click the Beta project card
Previous iterations:
  iter 0: at (361,205) said dx=100 dy=-5 conf=0.90 -> (461,200)
  iter 1: at (461,200) said dx=-76 dy=80 conf=0.90 -> (385,280)
  iter 2: at (423,240) said dx=0 dy=0 conf=1.00 -> (423,240)
  iter 3: at (423,240) said dx=-38 dy=39 conf=0.90 -> (385,279)
  iter 4: at (414,250) said dx=0 dy=0 conf=1.00 -> (414,250)
Call report_offset().

raw_message.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to click on the "Beta" project card.
The red crosshair is currently located at (414, 250) as per the previous iteration history, and looking at the image, it's inside the "Beta" card.

Let's find the center of the "Beta" project card.
The Beta card is the second card in the top row.
Its boundaries are roughly:
Left: ~268
Right: ~501
Top: ~184
Bottom: ~374
Center X: (268 + 501) / 2 = 384.5
Center Y: (184 + 374) / 2 = 279

The red crosshair is at (414, 250).
dx = Target X - Current X = 384.5 - 414 = -29.5
dy = Target Y - Current Y = 279 - 250 = 29

Let me re-estimate the Beta card boundaries more carefully.
The cards seem to be 233 pixels wide and 190 pixels high.
Alpha card: left=31, right=264, top=184, bottom=374. Center = (147.5, 279)
Beta card: left=268, right=501, top=184, bottom=374. Center = (384.5, 279)
Gamma card: left=505, right=738, top=184, bottom=374. Center = (621.5, 279)

Current crosshair position:
It is marked by the red cross. In the provided image, the red cross is at (414, 250) based on the prompt's history.
Wait, looking at the image, the red cross is clearly inside the Beta card, slightly to the right and above the center.
Beta center ~ (385, 279)
Current crosshair ~ (414, 250)
dx = 385 - 414 = -29
dy = 279 - 250 = 29

Let me refine the center of Beta card.
The Beta card is the middle one on top.
Its bounding box is roughly [184, 268, 374, 501].
Center is (384.5, 279).
The crosshair is at (414, 250).
dx = 384.5 - 414 = -29.5
dy = 279 - 250 = 29
Confidence: 0.9 since it's already very close.
